creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Installation of editors/linux-sublime && editors/linux-sublime3
don't start on 15-CURRENT.
I've installed both; first sublime, then sublime3. Neither
will run. A Ctrl+Alt+F1 reveals:

ELF binary type "0" not known.
exec: /usr/local/share/sublime/sublime_text: Exec format error

That's all I have.
